description: Per-encounter clinical attestation. G2 STRUCTURAL: encryptedPayloadCid REQUIRED; plaintext content fields rejected at schema layer (R1 additionalProperties=false). Clinical PHI is the most sensitive observation class in religious-corp. Patient identity uses 30-day rotating pseudonym DID per ADR-2605181200. Aggregate public fields ONLY (encounter type, duration bucket, provider DID); no PHI in public fields.

providerDid.description: Provider DID. Cross-link to providerAttestation; verified at cell entry.

consentRecordCid.description: G4 REQUIRED: per-encounter consent record (chigiri.consentRecord) CID

encryptedPayloadCid.description: G2 REQUIRED: ADR-2605181100 encrypted envelope CID containing all PHI (chief complaint, exam, assessment, plan). Plaintext content fields rejected at schema layer.

clinicFacilityCid.description: L5 clinicFacilityAttestation CID for the encounter site

encounterDurationMinBucket.description: Coarse duration bucket; precise duration in encrypted payload

aiAssistUsed.description: Whether AI clinical decision support was used (G12 Murakumo-only; G8 human-in-loop mandatory)

aiAssistRunCid.description: If aiAssistUsed=true, the AI-assist invocation record CID (provider sign-off attached per G8)

specialistReferralCid.description: If specialist referral generated, the referral record CID (cross-link to mitate)

emergencyEscalationCid.description: If mitate G5 emergency keyword matched, the escalation record CID (G10)
